description: Fail-loud: chronon3d_cli render must abort loudly when image assets are missing/unresolvable. Canonical error vocabulary: Composition/Layer/Asset/Path tokens in stderr, NO silent fallback markers, exit code != 0, output MP4 absent.
honesty_note: Variant of missing_font.json with image-specific rot_class; demonstrates diverse asset resolution FAIL paths. Per AGENTS.md Cat-3 anti-duplication: this JSON schema is shared across all 5 fixtures but the rot_class + cli_args differ per fixture — no duplicate schema files.
